welcome_message:
Read-only Databricks SQL Skill: Asset Installer

Installs a single-file Python wrapper around
`databricks experimental aitools tools query` that LLM agents can call
safely. Bundled as an agentskills.io-style skill: SKILL.md describes
when to use it, scripts/dbx-ro-query.py runs the SQL.

The wrapper allow-lists SELECT / WITH / SHOW / DESCRIBE / DESC /
EXPLAIN, blocks every destructive verb after stripping comments and
quoted strings, and emits agent-friendly output (auto, scalar, lines,
csv, tsv, json).

Let's pick the install path...

target_dir.description:
Target directory for the skill (relative to your bundle root).
Defaults to `.agents`, which matches the convention used by Codex,
the Databricks AI Dev Kit, and any vendor-neutral multi-agent setup.
Files install at <target_dir>/skills/dbx-ro-query/SKILL.md and
<target_dir>/skills/dbx-ro-query/scripts/dbx-ro-query.py.

If you only use one agent and want auto-discovery, override with the
agent's native folder:
  - Claude Code:  .claude
  - Codex:        .codex
  - Cursor:       .cursor
  - Gemini CLI:   .gemini

Pick a path whose `skills/dbx-ro-query/` subfolder doesn't already
exist in your project.
target_dir
target_dir.pattern_match_failure_message: Target directory must start with a letter, number, underscore, or dot and contain only letters, numbers, underscores, slashes, hyphens, or dots.

success_message:
Skill installed at '{{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/'.

Next steps:

1. Wire the skill into your agent. Pick the line that matches your setup:

   Claude Code
   - Auto-discovery folder is `.claude/skills/`. If you installed to `.claude` directly, you're done.
   - Otherwise add to CLAUDE.md:
     > Use the skill at {{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/SKILL.md when running read-only SQL against Databricks.
   - Cold-start tips: see {{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/references/agent-claude-code.md.

   Codex
   - Add to AGENTS.md:
     > Use the skill at {{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/SKILL.md for read-only Databricks SQL. Invoke `python {{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/scripts/dbx-ro-query.py "<sql>" "<profile>" "<format>"`.
   - Sandbox network and shell quirks: see {{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/references/agent-codex.md.

   Cursor
   - Cursor does NOT auto-discover `.cursor/skills/`. Drop a rule at `.cursor/rules/dbx-ro-query.mdc` (the exact snippet is in {{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/references/agent-cursor.md).

   Gemini CLI
   - Reference {{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/SKILL.md from your `.gemini/` configuration.

   Other / multi-agent
   - Point your agent at {{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/SKILL.md however your runtime expects.

2. Smoke check the wrapper:
   python {{.target_dir}}/skills/dbx-ro-query/scripts/dbx-ro-query.py "SELECT 1" <your-profile> scalar
